conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.explanation: Common headache caused by muscle tension and stress

conditions.name: Sinus Headache
conditions.explanation: Pressure and inflammation in sinus cavities causing head pain

conditions.name: Migraine
conditions.explanation: Typically more severe with additional symptoms like light sensitivity

data.action: Take over-the-counter pain reliever and monitor symptoms for 24-48 hours.
home_tips: Stay hydrated and get adequate rest
Apply cold or warm compress to head
warning_signs: Headache with fever and stiff neck
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
